context_pointers.vague_reference: check the error output when accessing the protected property for debugging
context_pointers.actual_meaning: This constraint refers to a specific exception context generation failure where a protected property named RcbHarness::$app is accessed on an object named RcbHarness, resulting in the execution error message 'Cannot access protected property RcbHarness::$app'.

oracle_data.fallback_response: I don't have more detail on that — check the codebase or the existing test cases for the exact behavior.

feature10_filesystem_breadcrumbs.json.description: Instrumented filesystem operations create breadcrumbs with operation names, descriptions, and disk metadata.

cases.expected_output:
file_content=bar
span_count=1
breadcrumb_count=6
breadcrumb1_exists=true
breadcrumb1_category=file.put
breadcrumb1_level=info
breadcrumb1_message=foo (3 B)
breadcrumb1_metadata={"path":"foo","options":[],"disk":"local","driver":"local"}
breadcrumb2_exists=true
breadcrumb2_category=file.get
breadcrumb2_level=info
breadcrumb2_message=foo
breadcrumb2_metadata={"path":"foo","disk":"local","driver":"local"}
breadcrumb3_exists=true
breadcrumb3_category=file.assertExists
breadcrumb3_level=info
breadcrumb3_message=foo
breadcrumb3_metadata={"path":"foo","disk":"local","driver":"local"}
breadcrumb4_exists=true
breadcrumb4_category=file.delete
breadcrumb4_level=info
breadcrumb4_message=foo
breadcrumb4_metadata={"path":"foo","disk":"local","driver":"local"}
breadcrumb5_exists=true
breadcrumb5_category=file.delete
breadcrumb5_level=info
breadcrumb5_message=2 paths
breadcrumb5_metadata={"paths":["foo","bar"],"disk":"local","driver":"local"}
breadcrumb6_exists=true
breadcrumb6_category=file.files
breadcrumb6_level=info
breadcrumb6_message=null
breadcrumb6_metadata={"directory":null,"recursive":false,"disk":"local","driver":"local"}

feature11_database_spans.json.description: Database query events create spans with SQL descriptions and connection endpoint metadata.

feature12_log_event_mapping.json.description: Log records sent through the monitoring log channel become structured events with context-specific fields.

feature13_exception_context.json.description: Exceptions that expose array context attach that context to events, while missing or non-array context is ignored.

feature1_service_configuration.json.description: Service configuration is reflected in the initialized monitoring client.

cases.expected_output:
monitoring_bound=true
environment=testing
dsn_base=https://sentry.dev
dsn_project_id=123
dsn_public_key=publickey
dsn_secret_key=secretkey
error_types=24575

monitoring_bound=true
environment=override_env
dsn_base=null
dsn_project_id=null
dsn_public_key=null
dsn_secret_key=null
error_types=-1

feature2_route_transactions.json.description: Route events and event application expose the transaction name selected for monitoring events.

feature3_route_name_resolution.json.description: Request route metadata is converted into stable transaction names and source labels.

feature4_http_client_breadcrumbs.json.description: Outbound HTTP responses create breadcrumbs with request and response metadata without consuming streams.

cases.expected_output:
breadcrumb_count=1
breadcrumb_exists=true
breadcrumb_category=http
breadcrumb_level=info
breadcrumb_message=null
breadcrumb_metadata={"url":"https://example.com","http.request.method":"GET","http.response.status_code":200,"http.query":"","http.fragment":"","http.request.body.size":7,"http.response.body.size":8}
request_body_after_breadcrumb=request
response_body_after_breadcrumb=response

feature5_cache_breadcrumbs.json.description: Cache operations emit cache breadcrumbs when enabled and stay silent when disabled.

cases.expected_output:
breadcrumb_count=2
breadcrumb_exists=true
breadcrumb_category=cache
breadcrumb_level=info
breadcrumb_message=Read: foo
breadcrumb_metadata=[]

breadcrumb_count=1
breadcrumb_exists=true
breadcrumb_category=cache
breadcrumb_level=info
breadcrumb_message=Missed: foo
breadcrumb_metadata=[]

feature6_sql_breadcrumbs.json.description: Database query events emit SQL breadcrumbs according to query and binding recording settings.

feature7_log_breadcrumbs.json.description: Application log events emit log breadcrumbs only when log breadcrumbs are enabled.

cases.expected_output:
breadcrumb_count=1
breadcrumb_exists=true
breadcrumb_category=log.debug
breadcrumb_level=debug
breadcrumb_message=test message
breadcrumb_metadata=["1"]

feature8_console_breadcrumbs.json.description: Command-start events emit command breadcrumbs with command names and arguments when enabled.

cases.expected_output:
breadcrumb_count=1
breadcrumb_exists=true
breadcrumb_category=artisan.command
breadcrumb_level=info
breadcrumb_message=Starting Artisan command: test:command
breadcrumb_metadata={"input":"--foo=bar"}

feature9_filesystem_spans.json.description: Instrumented filesystem operations create tracing spans with operation names, descriptions, and disk metadata.

cases.expected_output:
file_content=bar
span_count=7
span1_op=file.put
span1_description=foo (3 B)
span1_data={"path":"foo","options":[],"disk":"local","driver":"local"}
span2_op=file.get
span2_description=foo
span2_data={"path":"foo","disk":"local","driver":"local"}
span3_op=file.assertExists
span3_description=foo
span3_data={"path":"foo","disk":"local","driver":"local"}
span4_op=file.delete
span4_description=foo
span4_data={"path":"foo","disk":"local","driver":"local"}
span5_op=file.delete
span5_description=2 paths
span5_data={"paths":["foo","bar"],"disk":"local","driver":"local"}
span6_op=file.files
span6_description=null
span6_data={"directory":null,"recursive":false,"disk":"local","driver":"local"}
breadcrumb_count=0

_constraints.output_rule: If dsn is null, all DSN fields become null strings. If environment is null/empty, use 'testing'. If error_types is not provided, default to -1.
Set event_root_transaction to route_url if initial_transaction is null or empty, else remain null.
If initial_transaction is set, set event_root_transaction to initial_transaction.

_constraints.input_condition: feature == 'route_transaction' and event == 'apply_to_event' and event_transaction is present
_constraints.output_rule: Preserve existing event_transaction regardless of initial_transaction value.
Transaction name falls back to route_url even if a generated route_name exists.
Replace parameter values with {param_name} in order. Repeat params get repeated placeholders.
Format breadcrumb_metadata as JSON object with url, http.request.method, http.response.status_code, http.query, http.fragment, http.request.body.size, http.response.body.size.

_constraints.input_condition: feature == 'cache_breadcrumbs' and enabled == true and action == 'put'
_constraints.output_rule: Message becomes 'Read: {key}'. Metadata is empty array.

_constraints.input_condition: feature == 'cache_breadcrumbs' and enabled == true and action == 'get' and no value found
_constraints.output_rule: Message becomes 'Missed: {key}'. Metadata is empty array.
No breadcrumbs produced, breadcrumb_count=0.

_constraints.input_condition: feature == 'sql_breadcrumbs' and record_queries == true and record_bindings == true
_constraints.output_rule: Message = query text. Metadata includes query text as bindings list.
No breadcrumbs produced.
Message = log message. Metadata = log context array.
No breadcrumbs produced.
Create breadcrumbs for put, get, assert_exists, delete operations.
Create spans with op names: file.put, file.get, file.assertExists, file.delete, file.files.
Server address = host-mysql, port = 3306.
Server address and port are null.
Fixed output: error=execution_error
Context is null.

_constraints.input_condition: feature == 'exception_context' and context_mode == 'array' and context is object
_constraints.output_rule: Context is JSON object of keyvalue pairs.

_constraints.input_condition: feature == 'exception_context' and context_mode == 'non_array' and context is string
_constraints.output_rule: Context is rejected/null.
Output file_exists status (example shows false)
Content visible in span description if spans enabled, breadcrumb message includes size.
Message indicates count of paths deleted.
Message is null.
